arts.ttl: Tottenham and Newcastle have same player ‘on top of list’ – Transfer won’t be entertained for ‘less than €30m’
arts.sum: Two months ago, we covered claims from France which stated Newcastle United are chasing Abdukodir Khusanov. Earlier this month, Le10 Sport reported Tottenham Hotspur are in the picture for the RC Lens player. Saturday’s edition of La Voix du Nord mentions Tottenham and Newcastle interest when discussing the 20-year-old’s growth at the Ligue 1 side. The post Tottenham and Newcastle have same player ‘on top of list’ – Transfer won’t be entertained for ‘less than €30m’ appeared first on Sport Witness.

arts.ttl: Mbeumo and Cunha pursuits backed as Newcastle United transfer verdict delivered
arts.sum: My view on this matter has not changed since the summer - above all else Newcastle United MUST ensure their next big money signing plays on the right wing. However, bringing in a natural, quality option on the right who could chip in would give Newcastle a new dimension, ease the burden on Alexander Isak and Anthony Gordon and give the group a much-needed shot in the arm.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United's £715m Premier League mission after breathtaking Manchester City announcement
arts.sum: Even head coach Eddie Howe finds himself keeping up to date with Newcastle's commercial activities and told Chronicle Live last week: "I think our revenue streams aren't where we want them to be. Newcastle United saw the revenue bar raised even higher when it comes to football's finance ladder after Manchester City's new accounts showed an incredible £715m - a new Premier League record.

arts.ttl: Travel warning for Newcastle United supporters ahead of Leicester City clash as major road closed
arts.sum: It said: “The A167 Gateshead Highway flyover is being shut to all traffic after an inspection by consultant structural engineers indicated a potential risk to safety if it remains open. Those who usually use the road when travelling to and from St James’ Park will need to find alternative routes or use public transport on Saturday.

arts.ttl: Newcastle vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Newcastle United host Leicester City in the Premier League this weekend looking to return to form. The Magpies are without a win in four leagues and have fallen adrift in the race for Europe. An inconsistent campaign has seen Newcastle win five, draw five and lose five of their 15 games. After showing signs of […] The post Newcastle vs Leicester – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Eddie Howe hints at William Osula change in light of Newcastle United setback
arts.sum: Osula has so far been restricted to just 12 minutes of Premier League football since arriving at Newcastle in the summer with Howe reluctant to introduce the 21-year-old from the bench in recent games, even with Wilson ruled out. The youngster has impressed behind the scenes and in brief spells for the Magpies, with Howe now suggesting he has no qualms over dishing out some game time in the coming weeks.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United put 35-year-old on standby for Leicester game and new Sven Botman return date
arts.sum: Eddie Howe will make a late call on who replaces Nick Pope against the Foxes after the England international suffered a knee injury this week. Newcastle United's veteran stopper Martin Dubravka has been placed on standby for today's clash with Leicester City in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Shock for Newcastle as talisman open to Man City move in January
arts.sum: Newcastle have been below par in 2024/25 and that could explain why talisman, Bruno Guimaraes, is open to a move to Man City as early as January. The Brazilian has only recently signed a new long-term deal with the Magpies but was furious with the performance from his team-mates during the recent defeat against Brentford. […] The post Shock for Newcastle as talisman open to Man City move in January appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Leicester star finally gets job he wants despite van Nistelrooy's 'great luxury'
arts.sum: But handed his first start of the Premier League season by the interim coaching team, Coady has since played 90 minutes in new manager Ruud van Nistelrooy’s first two games. His lack of game-time with City saw him take on a role he’s more used to playing with England.

arts.ttl: I shushed Newcastle United diehards at just 16 but I was left raging at St James' Park
arts.sum: Not only did Sessegnon score two goals in the visitors' 3-1 win - boldly putting his finger to his lips after his second - the youngster also won his side a penalty at the death in the Championship clash. Shout out to Tim Ream, but he's a centre-back who wanted to take the penalty.
